text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I really need to make sure I do well this time. My
last race was pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
choice_data_list: Don't put too much pressure on yourself.
Don't put too much pressure on yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, me? Pressure myself? It's not like I'm a
hot-shot racer or—
choice_data_list:
I'll take care of whatever happens afterward. So
just go out there and have fun running!

I'll take care of whatever happens afterward. So
just go out there and have fun running!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Putting on a brave face for me, are we?
Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right. I'll have fun out there. But
whatever happens, don't blame me, okay?
